Patch Set 8: Code-Review-1

(3 comments)

Sorry, the patches here need to be fixed.  The incorrect patch attribution was pointed out 2 patch versions ago and not fixed.

Either the messages should be fixed by refreshing this patch directly, or a follow-on patch submitted to correct the descriptions in the patches.  Please see patches in the series https://review.whamcloud.com/54216 to find the correct descriptions of the other patches.

I don't like to block useful patches from landing, but it seems if I don't mark it -1 then it will not be fixed.

commit.subject: LU-17028 ldiskfs: add support for openEuler 20.03 LTS
commit.message:
LU-17028 ldiskfs: add support for openEuler 20.03 LTS

Add lbuild and ldiskfs support for latest openEuler 20.03 LTS SP3.
Reference ldiskfs-4.18-rhel8.8.series and fix patch conflicts
manually.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Change-Id: I64bf4fd20b31a52baee9b77694d8977cbaa5e5a7
Signed-off-by: Xinliang Liu <xinliang.liu@linaro.org>
